mapper.select:
/* transferMapper.getTmntPpImgList */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM as contractNum , A.SVC_CNTR_NO as svcCntrNo FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND A.PPPO = 'PP' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt} AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = A.CUSTOMER_ID AND CONTRACT_NUM <> A.CONTRACT_NUM AND (SUB_STATUS <> 'C' OR (SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') > SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt}))) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) /* 이미 이관된 정보 제외 */ AND ROWNUM <= 1000
mapper.insert: /* transferMapper.insertCanPpImg */ INSERT INTO PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE@DL_CAN ( IMG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, IMG_GUBUN, IMG_FILE, IMG_PATH, STATUS, MEMO, REC_ID, REC_DT, ENC_FLAG ) SELECT IMG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, IMG_GUBUN, IMG_FILE, IMG_PATH, STATUS, MEMO, REC_ID, REC_DT, ENC_FLAG FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE@DL_CAN WHERE IMG_SEQ = A.IMG_SEQ )
